elements.original_description: A large bold green dollar sign with the number 10,000 floating in the center, surrounded by glowing coins and bills. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A large, bold, vivid green dollar sign in the foreground, with the number '10,000' floating clearly in its center. The background is filled with softly glowing, stylized gold coins and currency bills in motion, creating a dynamic and financial theme. The style is professional digital illustration with clean lines and a sense of depth, rendered on a neutral, unobtrusive background. High resolution, sharp focus, no text, no letters, no extraneous numbers, and absolutely no watermarks.
